headlines.headline: Ilval Financial reports rising costs pressuring margins in renewable storage

sentiment.reasoning: The report of rising costs directly indicates a negative impact on the company's profitability and margins.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
